meaning: water valve; sluice gate; (aviation) water salute
sentence: 工人把水门关上，防止河水倒灌。
pinyin: Gōng rén bǎ shuǐ mén guān shàng, fáng zhǐ hé shuǐ dào guàn.
english: The workers closed the sluice gate to prevent river water from flowing back.

sentence: 生物课上他们解剖了一只青蛙。
pinyin: Shēngwù kè shàng tāmen jiěpōu le yī zhī qīngwā.
english: In biology class they dissected a frog.

sentence: 周末我们去看了一部新片子。
pinyin: Zhōumò wǒmen qù kàn le yī bù xīn piānzi.
english: We went to see a new movie over the weekend.

meaning: amount; sum of money; fixed number
sentence: 捐款数额由你自己决定。
pinyin: Juānkuǎn shù'é yóu nǐ zìjǐ juédìng.
english: The donation amount is up to you to decide.

meaning: thwart; to obstruct (something); stand in the way
sentence: 任何人都不得阻挠正常的工作进程。
pinyin: Rènhé rén dōu bùdé zǔnáo zhèngcháng de gōngzuò jìnchéng.
english: No one is allowed to obstruct the normal work process.
